text.title: AI-Assisted Accessibility Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the ai-assisted-accessibility methodology end-to-end. Decision-gates surface stops when inputs do not pass.

step.name: scan-axe-pa11y
step.action: Run axe + pa11y; produce JSON reports per tool.

step.name: haiku-filter-rank
step.action: Haiku subagent dedupes + ranks by impact + filters known false positives.

step.name: sonnet-propose-fixes
step.action: Sonnet subagent generates code fixes with WCAG citations + file:line refs.

step.name: expert-validates
step.action: Human a11y expert reviews each fix; approves / rejects / amends.
step.decision-gate: If approval rate < 50%, retune prompts before continuing.

step.name: create-tickets
step.action: Open dev tickets carrying WCAG citation + file:line; throttle bulk alt-text per rule.
